title: Om Namah Shivaya
lyrics:
Om Namah Shivaya, Shivaya Namah Om...
Har Har Bhole Namah Shivaya, Girija Shankara Namah Shivaya...
meaning: I bow to Lord Shiva, the auspicious one. Hail to the benevolent one, the consort of Girija (Parvati).

title: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra
lyrics:
Om Tryambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pushti-Vardhanam
Urvarukamiva Bandhanan Mrityor Mukshiya Maamritat
meaning: We worship the three-eyed Lord Shiva, who is naturally fragrant, immensely merciful, and who nourishes all beings. May He liberate us from death for the sake of immortality, just as a cucumber is severed from its bondage to the creeper.

title: Shri Ram Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram
lyrics:
Shri Ram Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram...
Sita Ram Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram...
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, victory to Sita and Rama.

title: Raghupati Raghav Raja Ram
lyrics:
Raghupati Raghav Raja Ram, Patit Pavan Sita Ram
Ishwar Allah Tero Naam, Sabko Sanmati De Bhagwan
meaning: Lord of the Raghu dynasty, King Rama, purifier of the fallen, Sita and Rama. God and Allah are Your names; bestow wisdom upon everyone, O Lord.

title: Hare Krishna Maha Mantra
lyrics:
Hare Krishna Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna Hare Hare
Hare Rama Hare Rama, Rama Rama Hare Hare
meaning: O Lord, O energy of the Lord, please engage me in Your devotional service.

title: Achyutam Keshavam Krishna Damodaram
lyrics:
Achyutam Keshavam Krishna Damodaram
Rama Narayanam Janaki Vallabham
meaning: O Achyuta (imperishable), O Keshava (having long hair), O Krishna, O Damodara (one with a rope around his belly). O Rama, O Narayana, O consort of Janaki (Sita).
